pages.text:
Ti D addilan t eto secunites affendid in the teats of Peace, the Pressunt of the tmits State has perdso mar to propese to the Suate of then Marts State and che Coins Minister of Grand Britan has plodgeo l hielf to poore to the Point of the lates Set,

Great Britan an engagement, subject to the affinit

commit atel

Of the Corncil of the Seague of Natimo, A Coma, o tha assistaner of Pranas in Case of unprevotes attack by Germany.

may 6.1919

Moderatkom
